cleanup_plan: remove or ignore failed overlay outputs after blocked receipt
preserve failure evidence for debugging stage
drift_controls: compare predecessor sidecar hash before trusting handoff
write latest receipt/handoff pointers only after PASS

failure_modes.detection: missing file, hash mismatch, zip integrity failure, or validator failure
failure_modes.mode: stage writes incomplete or corrupted artifacts
failure_modes.recovery_strategy: rollback to previous stage bundle and rerun bounded repair stage
failure_modes.safe_state: block READY handoff and preserve failed receipt

failure_modes.detection: artifact path or handoff target outside RRP contract
failure_modes.mode: scope creep attempts downstream implementation inside RRP
failure_modes.recovery_strategy: route to correct downstream stage through SSO change control

recovery_objectives.data_loss_tolerance: no loss of source artifacts; overlay outputs may be discarded if gate fails
recovery_objectives.rpo: zero loss of validated receipts/handoffs already written to /mnt/data
recovery_objectives.success_state: RRP gate passes and downstream implementation can safely proceed.

recovery_runbook.action: Verify predecessor bundle checksum and ZIP integrity.
recovery_runbook.expected_result: checksum matches and testzip returns None

recovery_runbook.action: Validate RRP packet and run rollback gate.
Package RRP outputs and checksum sidecar.
recovery_runbook.expected_result: bundle exists, sidecar exists, ZIP integrity passes

trigger_conditions: RRP validator or rollback gate returns FAIL
required receipt or handoff is missing
rollback_plan.verification: Rerun validator, rollback gate, checksum verification, and zipfile.testzip.

validation_drills.pass_criteria: gate exits nonzero and records rollback-step violation
validation_drills.scenario: invalid packet with missing rollback steps

validation_drills.pass_criteria: validator exits nonzero on placeholder objective
validation_drills.scenario: invalid packet with unknown recovery objectives
